programme.desc: In 1953, an Art History teacher at a girls' school tries to broaden the strict horizons of her brilliant students.

programme.title: A Love like in Books
programme.desc: A bookstore owner imagines a possible fairytale romance with her new suitor, but suddenly her irritating former business consultant makes her see love from a new perspective.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN REUNION. On the island of Reunion, the body of the son of a wealthy landowner is found at the bottom of a ravine. Juliette Gentil and Zaccharia Bellême team up to discover the killer, and the investigation reveals a mix between reality and legend.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER AT SANCY MASSIF. Patrick, a 40-year-old shepherd in the Sancy massif in Auvergne, suffers a brutal attack. His mother, Marceline, thinks it was wolves and vows to take action, but upon discovering it was a homicide she decides to unmask the killer who took her son.

programme.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
programme.desc: On the first day of classes, Cameron falls in love with Bianca. The only problem is that Bianca is forbidden to go out without her sister Kat - a temperamental... It's then that Cameron challenges the only boy who can date Kat - a bully with a terrible reputation.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: A young military wife's illicit affair ends in tragedy when suspicions arise about her unexpected disappearance in the mines of Joshua Tree National Park.

programme.title: Romeo + Juliet
programme.desc: In this adaptation by Baz Luhrmann, William Shakespeare's classic love story moves from the Middle Ages to the futuristic city of Verona Beach. There, Romeo and Juliet fall in love and experience the love of a lifetime.

programme.title: Deuda de sangre
programme.desc: When Terry McCaleb is called to a crime scene where his partners Detective Waller and Arrango are waiting for him, he can't imagine how events will unfold. Victims five and six of the latest series of murders await him, and on a wall is written in blood "McCaleb, fuck me if you can" and a number code. As Terry tries to avoid giving answers to the reporters, he encounters one with blood on his shoes. He will chase him but when he almost catches him, he suffers a heart attack and falls to the ground. The suspect approaches and looks at him and Terry shoots him in the fog he sees without knowing if he has really wounded him. 2 years later, Terry is going to have some tests after his heart transplant. His doctor, Dr. Fox, gives him the all-clear before the retired agent goes to his ship, where he meets Graciella Rivers. The woman wants to hire him to investigate the disappearance of her nephew: Raymond. He also tells him that the heart that Terry has received is from Graciella's own sister. The next day the retired agent will meet with his former colleagues, who show him a security tape of a small store where there has been a murder. Even though it is prohibited, Terry will go there to ask questions to begin his investigation until he comes to the conclusion that the store robbery and murder has to do with another that occurred recently. As the investigation continues, Terry's stress increases, causing his recent transplant to hurt more and more. But the murders are there and the former agent is convinced that he will be able to find a relationship between all of them that will bring to light the culprit. This Clint Eastwood film exists in the same universe as "The Innocent." But despite his most famous roles playing Dirty Harry and other cops, this FBI agent is the last of Clint's incarnations as a detective.

programme.title: Mutiny on board
programme.desc: In 1787, the ship Bounty made a dangerous journey of 50,000 kilometers. After a month of sailing under strong storms, Captain William Bligh allows the crew to dock on a remote island so that they can rest. After seeing the situation of lack of control among the sailors, the captain insists on returning to the boat to continue his trip. However, the second in command, Fletcher Christian, will support his men.

programme.title: Conan the destroyer
programme.desc: Queen Taramis entrusts Conan with a very dangerous mission: to accompany Princess Jehnna on a long journey for which she was born predestined. Their objective is to recover a jewel that is in the possession of a powerful sorcerer. If he succeeds, the queen promises that she will help him recover Valeria, his great love. But the monarch's intentions are very different since with the jewel she wants to bring an ancient god back to life.

programme.title: A winter on the beach
programme.desc: A writer lives with an obsession: his ex-wife, who eloped with another man years ago. Her problems cause her a literary block while her neighbor tries to get her to see life in a different way. The daughter and son of the protagonist also try to open a literary career.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Becky Fuller, an energetic TV producer, is fired from her job, her professional life becomes as bleak as her love life. To move forward with his career, he must face a new challenge: launching a morning magazine show on a New York channel.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker was abandoned by his parents when he was still a child, and was raised by his Uncle Ben and Aunt May. Somewhat marginalized at school, Peter wants to know his past and find out who he is, but there he meets his first love, Gwen Stacy. When Peter discovers a briefcase that belonged to his father, he begins a quest to learn how his parents disappeared, something that will take him to Oscorp and the laboratory of his father's former partner, Dr. Connor, where he is bitten by an experimentally modified spider that gives him incredible powers. The murder of his uncle by a thief will make him seek revenge, catching the criminals he finds in his path, so he realizes that his destiny is to help people. But Dr. Connor, in turn, is forced to test his own experiment (a lizard serum that regenerates body limbs) on himself after his dismissal, which turns him into The Lizard. This will spread panic among the citizens, and Peter will be forced to use his powers. It is the first film of a cinematographic reboot of this character, since due to script problems Sony had canceled the fourth installment of Spider-Man, opting for this reboot. Marc Webb is in charge of directing the film, and he specializes in the world of music videos, in which groups such as Green Day, My Chemical Romance, Evanescence, Maroon 5 and Fergie have featured him. His only films are (500) Days Together and the first and second installment of this new Spider-Man saga. Andrew Garfield plays Peter Parker. He began in theater and acted in Leones por Corderos and the television film Boy A, which gave him recognition; just like his performance in The Social Network. Emma Stone plays Gwen Stacy, and participated in films such as Campus Bunny, Ghosts of My Ex-Girlfriends, Crazy, Stupid, Love or Entitled to Friction. His role in Easy A earned him a Golden Globe nomination.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of the book "Playing the enemy" by John Carlin. In 1990 Nelson Mandela became President of his country, after having been released from prison. One of his most important measures was the abolition of apartheid. He intended to achieve reconciliation between the black and white populations. It was in 1995 when he used the Rugby World Cup in South Africa as an instrument to achieve national unity.

programme.title: Hilo mortal
programme.desc: A new explosive, whose color and taste are like water, threatens American politicians. The problem lies in the impossibility of analyzing the remains of the explosive material.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: Agent J has become an expert in alien matters after four years within the Men in Black; but no one can compare to K, his former co-worker who has returned to the peace of life working as a postmaster. While J works on a routine research task, he discovers Serleena, a Kylothian monster with the appearance of an attractive lingerie model, but whose plan endangers the integrity of the planet. So when Serleena attacks the Men in Black, J knows that the only one who can solve it is his former partner, so he tries to convince him that he has to go back to being a Man in Black; but K does not remember anything about his time working there; something that J will be in charge of. This film by Barry Sonnenfeld is the sequel to Men in Black, also starring Will Smith and Tommy Lee Jones. Barry Sonnenfeld began as a director of photography for the Coen brothers, until he made his first films such as Wild Wild West or The Big Mess. He is in charge of directing the three films in the saga and has also directed series such as The Tick. Will Smith (J) became known with the television series The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air, although he had already achieved some fame as a rapper before. His career in cinema is marked by groundbreaking films at the box office and especially science fiction, comedy and action such as Independence Day, Hitch or Two Rebel Police. Tommy Lee Jones (K) is an actor and director, and made his film debut with the film Love Story and became famous with the film The Fugitive. The film is based on the comic book story created by Lowell Cunningham and illustrated by Sandy Carruthers, which is about a secret international organization that monitors all paranormal activity on Earth, whether good or bad. Once the films were made, the story was acquired by Marvel; although the films are quite far from the dark tone of the film.

programme.title: Llamaradas
programme.desc: He was a child when he witnessed the death of his father in an act of service during a fire. Twenty years later, Brian is also a firefighter in Chicago. He is in a difficult trial period led by his brother Stephen who is very demanding of him. Both brothers will try to overcome disputes and memories of the past while an arsonist sets fires in the city.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Dr. Franks is a prestigious neurosurgeon who is going to carry out a unique and very dangerous operation: implant the memories, secrets and abilities of CIA agent Bill Pope who has just died in the mind of another person. This is a cutting-edge method that is presented as the only way the agency has to recover confidential information of vital importance from Pope's memory that compromises the national security of the United States. The problem is that the only candidate to become the vessel of the deceased's mind is Jericho Stewart, a dangerous and unpredictable convict who is on death row awaiting execution and who has a brain abnormality that makes him perfect for the mission. However, no one can assure that the result is the most effective way to stop a terrible conspiracy that is hanging over the country.

programme.title: Crank: High voltage
programme.desc: Hitman Chelios faces off against a Chinese gangster who has stolen his virtually indestructible heart and replaced it with a sophisticated battery-powered device that requires frequent bursts of electricity to continue functioning.

programme.title: Men in Black: The men in black
programme.desc: The Men in Black are agents who work for the government on a secret mission that consists of monitoring aliens living on our planet without us knowing. James Edwards (Will Smith), a police officer, and Agent K (Tommy Lee Jones), one of the Men in Black, discover that an alien terrorist intends to destroy Earth. James and Agent K will try to destroy these aliens and prevent humanity from being destroyed. In this film, Barry Sonnenfeld adapts the story of the same name by Lowell Cunningham, which refers to these supposed men in charge of hiding the existence of extraterrestrial life in various conspiracy theories. Sonnenfeld is known for films such as "Wild Wild West" (1999) and "The Adams Family" (1991). He began working for the Coen brothers as a director of photography but soon began making his own films. Originally "Men in Black" was offered to director Quentin Tarantino, who declined to participate in the project, as did Clint Eastwood, who was offered the role of Agent K. The film has several sequels directed by Sonnenfeld. The first feature film in the saga received positive reviews, something that the second installment did not achieve despite all of them being a great success at the box office. The film has three Oscar nominations, from which it won a statuette, and was also nominated for the Golden Gobles. The music, composed by Danny Elfman, caused the film "Men in Black" to be included in the American Film Institute's "100 Years&100 songs" list.

programme.title: I continue like God
programme.desc: Popular Buffalo reporter Evan Baxter has just become a congressman, so he moves with his family to a luxurious development in Huntsville, Virginia. Everything seems to be going well for the Baxter family, who are focused on adjusting to their new luxury-filled life away from their hometown. Evan is expectant since in his first days as a congressman, the powerful Congressman Long proposes that he work together with his team in the development of a bill, which makes him think that God has heard his prayers and that professional success has finally knocked on his door. However, Evan's future begins to falter when one day a man who calls himself God appears at his house and entrusts him with an important mission of biblical proportions: build an ark to save a pair of each animal species and thus save humanity from the approaching universal flood. Even though Evan is skeptical and considers the man crazy, when pairs of all kinds of animals begin to arrive in his garden and different suppliers begin to knock on his door bringing enormous quantities of wood and other materials, Evan is forced to believe in God and forcibly accept the order. Resigned and with the help of his three children and the manual 'Build Arks for Dummies', Evan begins his important task. During the process, many will consider Evan crazy and begin to call him 'The Noah of New York' as he will undergo a significant transformation, both physically and mentally.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: MI6 agent Ray Koval (Clive Owen) is in Dubai when he meets Claire Stenwick (Julia Roberts). After groping her a little, he manages to win her over and they spend the night together, without knowing that Claire is part of the CIA. When Ray wakes up the next day, the woman has disappeared with several compromised documents. For years, Ray searches for her, leaves his job at MI6 and gets a new one in the espionage department of a large multinational. In his third week of work he meets Claire again. Now they both work as spies for large companies and Claire is not willing to allow anyone to come and destroy the professional future she has been building for just over a year. The two spies will use all kinds of tricks to keep their positions, but they will also have to fight against the great attraction they feel for each other so as not to succumb to the other person's deceptions. In this film, actor Clive Owen plays MI6 spy Ray Koval. Owen began his career in television, working mainly on not very well-known series. Currently, although he still makes some stellar appearances on television, he is one of the best-known faces on the big screen. He has worked in films such as 'The Bourne Affair', 'King Arthur' and 'Closer' where he shares the bill for the first time with actress Julia Roberts. In 'Duplicity', Roberts plays Claire Stenwick, a retired CIA agent. The acclaimed actress began her career in 1987, in the series 'The History of Crime'. After that she worked in several films until she became famous with 'Pretty Woman' and her starring role alongside actor Richard Gere. From there her career took off and her charming smile made her 'America's Sweetheart'. He played several leading roles in romantic comedies but he has always tried to combine it with more serious roles such as those he played in 'Stay by me' or 'Erin Brockovich'.

programme.title: Time to kill
programme.desc: In a quiet southern town in Mississippi, two drunk young men savagely rape a 10-year-old black girl. The white majority of the city is horrified by such a heinous crime, until Carl Lee, Tonya's father, armed with an assault rifle, decides to take justice into his own hands and kills his daughter's rapists. For ten days, as tension grows and the burning crosses of the Ku Klux Klan reappear on the streets of Clanton, Jake Brigance, a young white lawyer, will do everything possible to save Carl Lee's life while trying not to lose his own.

programme.title: Deuda de sangre
programme.desc: When Terry McCaleb is called to a crime scene where his partners Detective Waller and Arrango are waiting for him, he can't imagine how events will unfold. Victims five and six of the latest series of murders await him, and on a wall is written in blood "McCaleb, fuck me if you can" and a number code. As Terry tries to avoid giving answers to the reporters, he encounters one with blood on his shoes. He will chase him but when he almost catches him, he suffers a heart attack and falls to the ground. The suspect approaches and looks at him and Terry shoots him in the fog he sees without knowing if he has really wounded him. 2 years later, Terry is going to have some tests after his heart transplant. His doctor, Dr. Fox, gives him the all-clear before the retired agent goes to his ship, where he meets Graciella Rivers. The woman wants to hire him to investigate the disappearance of her nephew: Raymond. He also tells him that the heart that Terry has received is from Graciella's own sister. The next day the retired agent will meet with his former colleagues, who show him a security tape of a small store where there has been a murder. Even though it is prohibited, Terry will go there to ask questions to begin his investigation until he comes to the conclusion that the store robbery and murder has to do with another that occurred recently. As the investigation continues, Terry's stress increases, causing his recent transplant to hurt more and more. But the murders are there and the former agent is convinced that he will be able to find a relationship between all of them that will bring to light the culprit. This Clint Eastwood film exists in the same universe as "The Innocent." But despite his most famous roles playing Dirty Harry and other cops, this FBI agent is the last of Clint's incarnations as a detective.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Natalie Cook, Dylan Sanders and Alex Munday are three special agents with overwhelming fighting and combat capabilities. But although each one is very different from the others, they will all be hired by a man named Charlie to carry out a special and very dangerous mission: find Eric Knox, a computer genius kidnapped because of his latest invention: an incredibly precise voice scanner. Through their investigations, Natalie, Dylan and Alex will discover clues that will lead them across the entire world, exuding charm and femininity to achieve their goals and destroying anyone who gets in their way. Drew Barrymore was a huge fan of the "Harry Potter" phenomenon, going so far as to read small parts of the different books to the members of the recording crew and the other actors. At the beginning of the film, when she is seen with glasses and black hair before being hired, she is also reading a Harry Potter book.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: The Edge
programme.desc: Second part of Charlie's Angels. Dylan, Natalie and Alex are sent by their boss on a new mission: locate a group of rings that have been stolen from the Department of Justice. This device allows its owner to know the list of people who are in the FBI's Witness Protection Program. When the first witnesses begin to appear dead, the Angels will have to use all their ingenuity to solve the case. An exceptional cameo can be seen in this film: one of the original Angels, Jaclyn Smith.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner is a renowned scientist, with a murky family past, who suffers with his team a serious laboratory accident in which everyone is exposed to intense gamma radiation. When he discovers that he is the only one who has survived, he is confused and begins to investigate. But Bruce has developed a terrible ability after the accident that could hinder the investigation; when he gets angry he turns into a giant green monster with irrational and destructive behavior. To create the Hulk character using digital technology, the company Light & Magic made the largest technical deployment in its history. It was necessary to work together with one hundred and eighty ILM technicians and work on the character for more than a year and a half. Even so, there are viewers who have compared the technical quality of the Hulk to that of Shrek. In this film, Hulk reaches the largest size he had reached to date, nine meters tall. Ang Lee used the split-screen technique to cinematically imitate the panels of a comic book page. To do this, he had to shoot the same scene several times, which somewhat exhausted actor Eric Bana, who plays Brece Banner. Much of the microbiology work seen on screen is real, done by Ang Lee's wife.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Running at full speed around the track, doing everything around, over and through the competition. Speed ​​Racer is a born racer, born to drive racing cars. Speed ​​is aggressive, instinctive and, above all, reckless. His only competition is the memory of his brother, his idol, the legendary Rex Racer, whose death in a race has left a goal that Speed ​​feels the need to fulfill. Speed ​​feels a great loyalty to the family racing business run by his father, Pops Racer, the designer of the powerful Mach 5 car he pilots. When Speed ​​rejects a very lucrative and tempting offer from Royalton Industries, he not only angers the company's maniacal owner but also discovers a terrible secret: some of the most important races are being manipulated by a handful of heartless businessmen who manipulate the most important drivers to get more money. If Speed ​​does not drive for Royalton's team, Royalton will ensure that the Mach 5 never crosses the finish line. The only way Speed ​​can save his family's business and the sport he loves is to beat Royalton at its own game. With the support of his family and his loyal girlfriend, Trixie, Speed ​​teams up with his former rival, the mysterious Racer X, to win the race that killed his brother: the death-defying cross-country rally.

programme.title: the ghostbusters
programme.desc: Dr. Peter Venkman (Bill Murray) takes advantage of his research scholarship at the University to torture boys and conquer girls who take psychosensory tests. He is actually a very capable scientist who resorts to logic rather than superstition, but he uses the girls' gullibility to flirt with them. His friends, Dr. Raymond Stantz (Dan Aykroyd) and Dr. Egon Spengler (Harold Ramis), carry out ectoplasmic studies to investigate the possible existence of ghosts and even capture one for later study. The first time they have a warning about the real presence of a ghost in a library, they don't know how to deal with it and run away. It is after they are kicked out of the University that they decide to mortgage Stantz's house and start their own ghost hunting company. Over time they manage to develop machines that trap ectoplasmic beings for later study. But the jobs that come to the office are nonsense with what is about to fall on them. A young woman who lives alone begins to have truly shocking paranormal experiences in her home and decides to call the Ghostbusters to help her. The investigation will take them further than they ever thought they would go, seeing things they would never have dreamed of seeing. In Aykroyd's original script, the story took place in a future where there would be teams of ghostbusters like there are today of paramedics or firefighters. But the budget studied for that type of film amounted to three hundred million dollars and Aykroyd was forced to adapt it to the scientific reality of the 1980s. Initially other actors were going to play some of the most important roles in the film: John Candy was going to be Louis Tully, John Belushi was going to be Dr. Peter Venkman, and the role of Winston was written specifically for Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Texas. Two years before the American Civil War broke out. King Schultz is a German bounty hunter who is tracking murderers to collect for their heads, and he promises the black slave Django to set him free on the condition that he helps him catch them. Django accepts, since his greatest wish is to go rescue his wife Broomhilda, a slave who is on the plantation of landowner Calvin Candie. This film, written and directed by Quentin Tarantino, is a western film with references to the spaghetti western genre; genre through which I wanted to portray a story about slavery like this one. Tarantino is a renowned American director, producer and screenwriter whose films are characterized by addressing non-linear stories, violence, Grindhouse influences, kung fu and spaghetti westerns. Starring Jamie Foxx ('Bait', 'Collateral'), Christoph Waltz ('Inglourious Basterds', 'Dorian'), Leonardo DiCaprio ('Titanic', 'The Great Gatsby') and Samuel L. Jackson ('S.W.A.T.', 'Star Wars'); The film is a mix of good dialogue, rhythm, irony, and an impeccable soundtrack that captures the viewer's attention at all times.

programme.title: damn bastards
programme.desc: With France occupied by the Nazis, a young Jewish woman witnesses the cruel murder of her parents by the expert Jew hunter Colonel Hans Landa. Barely escaping to save her life, she begins to plot revenge when years later a German war hero becomes interested in her and decides to premiere a film dedicated to her in his theater, which will be attended by great Nazi officers. This premiere catches the attention of "The Bastards", a group of Jewish-American soldiers led by Captain Aldo Raine. When the plans of this group of ruthless avengers and the young Jewish girl's conspiracy are put into motion, their paths will meet during an afternoon that will forever change the course of history. Although 30% of the film is originally spoken in English, the predominant languages ​​throughout the film are French and German, and a bit of Italian. In chapter three of the film "German Night in Paris" there is not a single sentence in English, something totally unusual in a Hollywood production.

programme.title: Conan the destroyer
programme.desc: Queen Taramis entrusts Conan with a very dangerous mission: to accompany Princess Jehnna on a long journey for which she was born predestined. Their objective is to recover a jewel that is in the possession of a powerful sorcerer. If he succeeds, the queen promises that she will help him recover Valeria, his great love. But the monarch's intentions are very different since with the jewel she wants to bring an ancient god back to life.

programme.title: Mutiny on board
programme.desc: In 1787, the ship Bounty made a dangerous journey of 50,000 kilometers. After a month of sailing under strong storms, Captain William Bligh allows the crew to dock on a remote island so that they can rest. After seeing the situation of lack of control among the sailors, the captain insists on returning to the boat to continue his trip. However, the second in command, Fletcher Christian, will support his men.

programme.title: The silence of the lambs
programme.desc: Promising FBI agent Clarice Starling is pulled from her special forces training by Jack Crawford of the FBI's Behavioral Study Unit. He wants me to study a notorious eccentric psychopath named Habbibal Lecter, who was a forensic psychiatrist imprisoned for multiple murders and cannibalism. The purpose of the meetings between Clarice and Hannibal must be for the latter to agree to help her catch a serial killer named Buffalo Bill. But what the woman did not imagine was that Hannibal would turn out to be a sophisticated and cultured man restricted from others by glass walls. Although he is polite at first, he soon begins to lose patience when Clarice tries to create a psychological profile for him. While the hunts continue throughout Chicago and Buffalo Bill collects his kills without the FBI being able to do anything to solve it, Clarice will have to find a way to ingratiate herself with a man who ate the people around him and show him that, in addition to being intelligent, she is not afraid of him at all. Things will start to get difficult when the Senator's daughter disappears and everything indicates that Buffalo Bill has her and that soon her body will appear as a new victim. The events of this film take place after what happened in the film Hunter (1986). Although there are many characters in common in the two films, only two of the actors share films. Frankie Faison plays Lt. Fisk in Hunter and Barney in The Silence of the Lambs; On the other hand, Dan Butler plays the fingerprint expert FBI agent in Hunter and an entomologist in "The Silence of the Lambs."

programme.title: natural born killers
programme.desc: Mickey and Mallory are two young people who, in love and maddened, murder the girl's father in cold blood and begin a flight. The host of a sensationalist program decides to take advantage of the fascination that his personality exerts on the public to turn the murderers into television heroes.

programme.title: A doctor in the countryside
programme.desc: After 30 years working as the only doctor in a small village in a rural area of ​​southern France, Jean-Pierre falls ill. Health problems remove the doctor who treated, cured and cared for his neighbors from the profession 365 days a year and at any time. That is why it is necessary for another person to move in to replace him during sick leave. At that moment, Nathalie, a young doctor who has just finished her residency and who also has extensive experience as a nurse, arrives in the village. She will be in charge of helping Pierre with his work when he can't, but it will be a professional challenge because she has never worked in a medical office in a small town. In this way, it will also be complicated for Jean-Pierre because for him his work is the most important thing, so he will have to learn to deal with his new partner.

programme.title: The Scholar
programme.desc: Young Jules runs a very successful online fashion business. As part of a new job program, you will have to agree to hire the elderly Ben as a senior intern. You will soon realize that your experience and attitude can be very important to the company.

programme.title: Men in Black: The men in black
programme.desc: The Men in Black are agents who work for the government on a secret mission that consists of monitoring aliens living on our planet without us knowing. James Edwards (Will Smith), a police officer, and Agent K (Tommy Lee Jones), one of the Men in Black, discover that an alien terrorist intends to destroy Earth. James and Agent K will try to destroy these aliens and prevent humanity from being destroyed. In this film, Barry Sonnenfeld adapts the story of the same name by Lowell Cunningham, which refers to these supposed men in charge of hiding the existence of extraterrestrial life in various conspiracy theories. Sonnenfeld is known for films such as "Wild Wild West" (1999) and "The Adams Family" (1991). He began working for the Coen brothers as a director of photography but soon began making his own films. Originally "Men in Black" was offered to director Quentin Tarantino, who declined to participate in the project, as did Clint Eastwood, who was offered the role of Agent K. The film has several sequels directed by Sonnenfeld. The first feature film in the saga received positive reviews, something that the second installment did not achieve despite all of them being a great success at the box office. The film has three Oscar nominations, from which it won a statuette, and was also nominated for the Golden Gobles. The music, composed by Danny Elfman, caused the film "Men in Black" to be included in the American Film Institute's "100 Years&100 songs" list.

While J works on a routine research task, he discovers Serleena, a Kylothian monster with the appearance of an attractive lingerie model, but whose plan endangers the integrity of the planet. So when Serleena attacks the Men in Black, J knows that the only one who can solve it is his former partner, so he tries to convince him that he has to go back to being a Man in Black; but K does not remember anything about his time working there; something that J will be in charge of. Barry Sonnenfeld began as a director of photography for the Coen brothers, until he made his first films such as Wild Wild West or The Big Mess. He is in charge of directing the three films in the saga and has also directed series such as The Tick. Will Smith (J) became known with the television series The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air, although he had already achieved some fame as a rapper before. His career in cinema is marked by groundbreaking films at the box office and especially science fiction, comedy and action such as Independence Day, Hitch or Two Rebel Police. Tommy Lee Jones (K) is an actor and director, and made his film debut with the film Love Story and became famous with the film The Fugitive. The film is based on the comic book story created by Lowell Cunningham and illustrated by Sandy Carruthers, which is about a secret international organization that monitors all paranormal activity on Earth, whether good or bad. Once the films were made, the story was acquired by Marvel; although the films are quite far from the dark tone of the film.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: A very dangerous alien has escaped from the high-security prison on the Moon with the help of his exuberant admirer. The alien is called "Boris the Animal", a ruthless being that Agent K. captured in 1969 and whom they must face again. Unaware of Boris's escape, K. (Tommy Lee Jones) and J. (Will Smith) continue carrying out their work as M.I.B. agents. ridding the city of dangerous aliens or aliens with petty crimes. At the beginning of a new day, J. can't find his partner anywhere, but that's not the most worrying thing, no one at the agency seems to know of his existence. In his investigation he will realize that Boris has made a jump in time and has killed K. completely changing history and causing the Earth to be unprotected against an imminent alien attack. J. will have to travel back in time to recover his partner and save the future of the planet. Specifically, he will travel to the year 1969, when K. is still a young agent with a certain sense of humor. Together they will try to catch the evil Boris. To do this, they will have the intermittent and relative help of a character who is capable of seeing all the space-time lines of the Universe at every moment. The film began filming without a definitive script, so production was delayed due to all the rewrites that were done until it was completed. For the role of Boris, the participation of actor Sacha Baron Cohen, known for his leading roles in the films "Borat" and "The Dictator", was reconsidered. But in the end the role was awarded to Jemaine Clement. The makeup he wore to embody the alien took four and a half hours to apply each day of filming. Will Smith had his ups and downs with the film's director, Barry Sonnenfeld, because he wanted the person to play the role of the colonel's son to be his son, Jaden Smith, and not Cayen Martin, who ultimately got the role.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

According to the Mayan calendar, the year 2012 is set as the date of the end of the world. This end of the world will bring different natural disasters, volcanoes will erupt, there will be major floods, typhoons... Jackson Curtis (John Cusack) is a writer of science fiction stories who also works as a driver for a Russian millionaire. Jackson is divorced and has two children, Lilly (Morgan Lily) and Noah (Liam James) who live with his ex-wife's boyfriend. One day, when Jackson and his children return home they find that great seismic activity is affecting the entire West Coast of the United States. Suddenly the Curtis family will find themselves immersed in a fight to survive what could be the end of the world. Actor John Cusack, known for his performance in films such as '1408' (2007), 'High Fidelity' (2000) and 'How to Be John Malkovich' (1999), stars in this feature film about the consequences of the end of the world that the Mayans predicted would happen in 2012. Its director, Roland Emmerich, specialized in action films and apocalyptic and disaster films, confirmed the film's completion. of a television series, a sequel to the feature film, which would be based on the survivors of the disaster. An alternative ending to the film was also included in some versions of the DVD marketed in different countries. For its promotion, a trailer was used in which you could see how a tsunami threatened the Himalayas, ending with the phrase 'The governments of the world did not prepare the people for the end of the world, find out the truth.' The page of the fictitious organization 'Institute for Human Continuity' was also launched, thus beginning an important viral marketing strategy.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: Following the sentencing of 13 people for violent disorder during protests in Southampton, attention has turned to the role of content creators who film demonstrations and public disorder. The judge cited the usefulness of footage filmed by so-called 'citizen journalists'. Siddharth Venkataramakrishnan of the Institute for Strategic Dialogue and content creator Wesley Winter give their perspective on the issue. The BBC has begun setting out changes as part of plans to deliver significant savings across the organisation. The measures include the closure of several programmes across radio and current affairs output, alongside wider reductions in staffing. Jonathan Munro, global director of BBC News, outlines the changes. Norma Percy has spent years getting to the heart of some of the biggest moments in recent history. Her documentaries have been celebrated for talking directly to the people who made the decisions. As the BBC airs her latest film - about Brexit - she reflects on her storied career and the future of documentary-making.

programme.title: China's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: Tea is a national drink in China. But it's far more than just a drink for Chinese people. Tea as a culture became fashionable in China during the Tang Dynasty. In this episode, British historian Alastair Sooke discovers how this simple drink has been transformed over centuries into an important social institution, and how it continues to be an essential part of Chinese culture today.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Big Cases
programme.desc: How the husband of Scotland's longest-serving first minister, Nicola Sturgeon, embezzled £400,000 from the party he ran - using a paper trail of lies to cover up a spending spree on luxury goods, from a motor home to coffee machines and even toilet seats. Peter Murrell was one of the most powerful figures in Scottish politics, operating away from the spotlight as chief executive of Scotland's ruling party. But behind the scenes, police pieced together a scandal - which ended in a dawn raid - involving hundreds of thousands of pounds in missing money. He pleaded guilty, while his estranged wife, the party's former leader, denied all knowledge. From the corridors of Holyrood to the highest ranks of the SNP, loyalties fractured as Mr Murrell's reputation collapsed. With insider testimony, analysis and extraordinary revelations from the case, this is a story of power, money and betrayal at the heart of modern Scottish politics.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: On the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, Dwayne Fields travels across the USA, exploring how the document's famous promise - the pursuit of happiness - is being lived today. In part one of two, Dwayne finds out how the Great Migration has impacted Chicago, tries America's highest zip line in Colorado before saddling up to see how tourism has transformed the lives of Utah's iconic cowboys.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: As governments and businesses confront their reliance on US tech giants, AI Decoded explores whether Britain can build its own AI future - and how quickly it must act. Now, a sudden decision from Washington is sending shockwaves through the global AI industry, restricting access to some of America’s most advanced systems - even for its allies. For UK companies, it raises a stark question: what happens when the technology you depend on is no longer available? Presenter Marc Cieslak is joined by Yang Li of East London startup Cosine, now racing to build a 'sovereign' British alternative as demand surges following the US clampdown. Bloomberg’s Katrina Manson also joins to unpack the national security stakes, alongside co-host Stephanie Hare.

Punched by Love
programme.desc: Meskipun ibunya melarang, Indah tetap ingin menjadi seorang petinju. Saat sanggar tinju mengeluarkannya karena kesalahan pengisian data, Indah belajar kepada seorang rekan sesama petinju. Dan cinta pun tumbuh di antara mereka.

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Dompet
programme.desc: Tak ingin diledek jomblo terus, Kinan berpura-pura menjadi pacar Reno yang tajir, namun Reno hanya memanfaatkan Kinan saja. Ternyata Reno tidak setajir yang Kinan kira.

programme.title: Ku Tambal Hatimu Dengan Cinta
programme.desc: Olin, gadis tomboy yang berniat bekerja di Jakarta setelah lulus SMA. Dia bertemu Ucok dan bekerja di bengkel miliknya. Tapi Bams membeli lapaknya, dan Ucok diusir. Peristiwa itu membuat Olin bermusuhan dengan Bams.

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat Bantal Mimpi Indah
programme.desc: Marina mendapatkan bantal dari toko KR. Amat. Bantal ini punya khasiat jika digunakan saat tidur maka waktu bisa diputar kembali. Segala sesuatu yang menyangkut masa lalu dapat terulang kembali dan apapun yang diinginkan terwujud

programme.title: Sunan Ampel Dan Kebun Singkong Emas
programme.desc: Sunan Ampel datang ke desa Kembang Kuning. Untuk meredakan perseteruan Ki Bangkuning dan Ki Wiryo atas sebidang tanah, dia menanam singkong di tanah tersebut, dan setelah dipanen singkong tersebut ternyata menghasilkan emas.

programme.title: Mencari Pangeran Sepatu Basket
programme.desc: Miranda trauma dengan pria, hubungannya selalu gagal dan dia selalu dikecewakan. Untuk mengobati hati, Miranda pergi liburan dengan kapal pesiar. Tak di sangka di kapal pesiar itu Miranda justru berkenalan dengan Ibas.

programme.title: Orang Kelima
programme.desc: Satu keluarga membeli sebuah rumah. Tapi sejak tinggal disana, mereka sering dihantui tangan buntung. Setelah bertanya pada paranormal, ternyata arwah tangan buntung tersebut ingin bertemu dengan pemilik rumah yang dulu.

programme.title: Punched by Love
programme.desc: Meskipun ibunya melarang, Indah tetap ingin menjadi seorang petinju. Saat sanggar tinju mengeluarkannya karena kesalahan pengisian data, Indah belajar kepada seorang rekan sesama petinju. Dan cinta pun tumbuh di antara mereka.

programme.title: Pliss Gue Bukan Princess
programme.desc: Genta mengenalkan Alila, pacarnya, ke ibunya. Namun, Alila dianggap kurang feminin, sehingga ibu Genta memberi waktu agar Alila bisa berubah.

programme.title: Radio Kabar Buruk
programme.desc: Seorang wartawan yang sering membuat marah atasannya karena lambat bekerja dan selalu ketinggalan berita. Setelah menemukan radio antik di Toko Kr. Amat, dia selalu mengetahui semua peristiwa-peristiwa penting.

programme.title: Dari Merpati Turun Ke Hati
programme.desc: Darso, cowok ceplas ceplos yang hobi main burung merpati. Darso kelimpungan ketika burung merpatinya hilang. Tak dinyana merpatinya hinggap di rumah Ayu, gadis cantik yang dijodohin ayahnya dengan Bimo. Darso menuduh Ayu.

programme.title: The charm of Semar Mesem
programme.desc: Nirmala dulunya gadis buruk rupa yang sering ditolak pria, tapi sejak menggunakan mustika semar mesem dia berubah cantik. Dia memanfaatkannya untuk membalas dendam kepada para pria yang pernah menolaknya.

programme.title: Cantik Cantik Jagoan
programme.desc: Tiga orang cewek berlatar belakang berbeda yang menjadi agen rahasia Mr. X: Arlista, Angel, dan Icha, ditugaskan di salah satu SMA dan menyamar untuk menyelidiki kasus hilangnya para siswi SMA tersebut.

programme.title: Kesengsem Tukang Sedot WC
programme.desc: Dika, seorang tukang sedot WC yang tampan, yang terlibat masalah dengan atasan barunya, anak perempuan pemilik perusahaan yang ditugaskan untuk menyelidiki dugaan penyelewengan dana perusahaan.

programme.title: Sweet Martabak Buat Kamu Yang Manis
programme.desc: Kenang, cowok manis penjual martabak yang bikin cewek-cewek kepincut ini memang jago meracik martabak. Namun mengapa kenang dan Jingga kerap berseteru?

programme.title: Pacar Dari Langit
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya sakit. Mega terpaksa pulang ke kampung halaman dan jatuh cinta kepada alien bernama Zen. yang berjanji akan selalu menjaganya.

programme.title: Saat Teduh Bersama Gereja Mawar Sharon
Gambler's Delight
programme.desc: Dalam film tentang perjudian ini, Danny Lee berperan sebagai seorang penjudi putus asa yang melakukan kecurangan saat berjudi di sebuah kasino di Makau. Ia pun harus menghadapi seorang pemimpin geng asal Jepang.

programme.title: Gossip Street
programme.desc: Bintang-bintang Shaw Brothers dan TVB bersatu untuk film epik karya Wang Feng ini. Masalah muncul ketika seorang gangster berencana untuk mengubah tempat favorit penduduk Gossip Street menjadi sebuah sarang perjudian.

programme.title: My Rebellious Son
programme.desc: Seorang pejabat korup berusaha mencuri patung Buddha nan sangat berharga dari kuil untuk menyenangkan sekelompok orang dari Barat. Dokter Zhang dan putranya berhasil mengalahkan musuh dan menyelamatkan patung itu.

programme.title: Hong Kong Rhapsody
programme.desc: Hong Kong Rhapsody adalah film musikal yang penuh dengan lagu dan tarian. Peter Chen-Ho berperan sebagai pesulap playboy yang mengubah cara hidupnya setelah menjadi penjaga seorang penyanyi muda.

programme.title: Shaolin Prince
programme.desc: Ketika Kaisar dibunuh dan takhtanya dirampas oleh Lord 9, kedua pangeran yang masih bayi dipercayakan dalam perawatan tiga biksu Shaolin dan sang perdana menteri.

programme.title: The Enchanting Ghost
programme.desc: Saat seorang pemuda dan kekasihnya terpisah selamanya akibat ulah sang paman dan temannya, gadis itu pun terdorong untuk bunuh diri. Namun, arwah sang gadis muncul kembali untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Roving Swordsman
programme.desc: Sebuah klan jahat nan ambisius berniat untuk menguasai dunia seni bela diri. Untuk mencapai tujuan tersebut, mereka harus mencuri manuskrip seni bela diri rahasia yang menggambarkan cara membuat senjata api.

programme.title: Tragic Commitment
programme.desc: Selama lima tahun, Alex menjalani pernikahan bahagia dengan istrinya Tung, seorang ginekolog. Saat Alex terluka parah dalam sebuah kecelakaan, ia merasa harus memberitahu Tung tentang perselingkuhannya dengan Blackie.

programme.title: That Man In Chang-An
programme.desc: Kaisar Han meninggal dan Permaisuri Lu merebut alih kekuasaan. Ia merencanakan untuk membunuh pewaris takhta, Liu Heng. Namun, prajurit bertopeng mengetahui rencana jahatnya dan memberi tahu Liu.

programme.title: No doubt Charn
programme.desc: Berlatar di masa Dinasti Han, sekelompok orang yang dipimpin oleh Yang Chi-ching dan Lin Dai, berupaya untuk memisahkan sang gubernur dengan putranya dan akhirnya menyebabkan mereka saling memusuhi.

programme.title: The Master
programme.desc: Gao, murid dari ahli seni bela diri Shi. Suatu hari, ia secara tak sengaja menyelamatkan musuh tuannya, Jin, hingga ia mengajarinya seni bela diri nan unik sebagai balasannya. Namun, Master Shi mengira Gao berkhianat.

programme.title: The Crimson Palm
programme.desc: Kisah ini bercerita tentang Lin Shao-teh, seorang mahasiswa miskin yang bertunangan dengan Chien-king, putri dari seorang miliarder bernama Wang Chun.

programme.title: Moods Of Love
programme.desc: Film yang berlatar di era Dinasti Song ini mengisahkan dua cerita tentang seberapa jauh seseorang akan berkorban demi cinta atau nafsu.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: Usai saudaranya membunuh kepala triad saingannya, Jie menjadi tersangka dan diburu oleh para pembunuh. Dengan bantuan Nan, ia akhirnya menghabisi musuhnya, tapi kemudian ia tahu bahwa Nan lah yang membunuh ayahnya.

programme.title: Village Of Tigers
programme.desc: Para penduduk jahat dari Desa Macan, yang dipimpin oleh Hu Jiao, berencana untuk membunuh Lo Hong Shun, atau dikenal sebagai Pahlawan Pedang dari Langit Selatan.

programme.title: Village Of Tigers
programme.desc: Para penduduk jahat dari Desa Macan, yang dipimpin oleh Hu Jiao, berencana untuk membunuh Lo Hong Shun, atau dikenal sebagai Pahlawan Pedang dari Langit Selatan.

programme.title: The Shepherd Girl
programme.desc: The Shepherd Girl, drama musikal tahun 1963 karya Shaw Brothers! Di film ini, Julie Yeh Feng berperan sebagai Hsiu Hsiu, gadis penggembala cantik yang jatuh cinta pada pelaut tampan bernama Liu Ta-lung.

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: Pendeta Alis Putih mendukung pemerintah Qing yang kejam, dan membakar kuil Shaolin serta memburu para muridnya. Hung dari Shaolin jatuh cinta pada Fang saat melarikan diri dan ia dibunuh oleh sang Pendeta.

programme.title: A Friend From Inner Space
programme.desc: Shek Kin, yang biasa berperan sebagai tokoh jahat, mengambil peran langka di film komedi tentang hantu lucu yang berteman dengan seorang anak lelaki dan membantu sang anak menyatukan kembali orangtuanya yang berseteru.

programme.title: Judgement Of An Assassin
programme.desc: Sebuah klan jahat merencanakan perselisihan untuk mendominasi dunia seni bela diri. Pembunuh bertopeng mereka membantai klan-klan lain dan salah satu pembunuh ditangkap dan diadili di pengadilan antarklan.

programme.title: Hong Kong 73
programme.desc: Di tahun 1973, bursa saham meroket, namun masalah-masalah sosial di Hong Kong terus memburuk. Bintang-bintang besar TVB dan Shaw Brothers bersatu dalam kisah yang lucu ini.

programme.title: Trilogy Of Swordsmanship
programme.desc: Film antologi kung fu tentang seorang pria yang mempermalukan dirinya sendiri, seorang PSK yang jatuh cinta dengan seorang jenderal dan sekelompok bandit yang berencana menyelamatkan seorang teman dari eksekusi.

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples
programme.desc: Tiga pendekar kung fu dari latar belakang yang sangat berbeda menjadi murid Shaolin di kuil yang sama: Lo Lieh sang Pengawal Kerajaan, Lo Meng sang tentara yang melarikan diri, dan Wang Yu si pria desa.

programme.title: All Men Are Brothers
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah patriotik tentang tujuh prajurit dalam kelompok penjahat 108 di Gunung Liang, serta tujuh pertempuran nan luar biasa melawan pejabat pemerintah yang kejam demi menyelamatkan negara mereka.

programme.title: The Emperor And The Minister
programme.desc: Kaisar Qianlong bukanlah penerus takhta yang sah sejak lahir, tetapi ia baru mengetahui kebenarannya saat dua anggota senior organisasi rahasia anti-pemerintah menghubunginya beberapa tahun kemudian.

programme.title: The Kid With The Golden Arm
programme.desc: Pemerintah mempekerjakan Yang untuk mengawal muatan emas ke daerah yang dilanda kelaparan. Geng Chi Sha, dengan salah satu petarung terbaik mereka, Golden Arm, berniat melakukan pembajakan dan membunuh karyawan Yang.

programme.title: Young Lovers
programme.desc: Seorang anak dari keluarga kaya yang gemar bermain gitar bernama Yang Fan pergi ke Jepang untuk bergabung dengan sebuah band rock. Ia juga berusaha mendapatkan cinta dari dua gadis cantik.

programme.title: Black Magic 2
programme.desc: Dokter Sing merasa bingung dengan gejala-gejala aneh yang dialami pasiennya dan meminta bantuan pada temannya. Penyakit tersebut rupanya disebabkan oleh ilmu hitam yang dilakukan oleh seorang pria jahat bernama Kong.

programme.title: The Eunuch
programme.desc: Sebelum menyutradari Bruce Lee dalam film Fist Of Fury, Lo Wei telah menulis dan membintangi film yang mengisahkan seorang pengkhianat yang rela membunuh Kaisar demi merebut kekuasaan tertinggi ini.

programme.title: Pursuit Of Vengeance
programme.desc: Legenda Kung Fu Ti Lung membintangi film laga ini sebagai Fu Xue Hong, yang memulai perjalanan agar dapat membalas dendam untuk ayahnya.

programme.title: Pursuit Of Vengeance
programme.desc: Legenda Kung Fu Ti Lung membintangi film laga ini sebagai Fu Xue Hong, yang memulai perjalanan agar dapat membalas dendam untuk ayahnya.

programme.title: We Love Millionaires
programme.desc: Tiga gadis pramuniaga cantik asal Hong Kong pergi ke utara untuk menyamar sebagai orang kaya dan mewujudkan impian mereka untuk menikahi pria kaya.

programme.title: Notorious Eight
programme.desc: Chen Chi-chin kalah banyak dari penjudi berpengalaman Hu Kuan-ten. Ayahnya kalah dalam permainan kartu dan mati karena kaget. Chen meminta bantuan pamannya yang memanggil 7 rekan penjudi untuk melampiaskan dendam.

programme.title: The Blue And The Black, Pt 2
Rolls, Rolls, I Love You
programme.desc: Tiga pemuda menyinggung seorang miliarder dan terlibat dalam taruhan yang tinggi. Jika menang, mereka bisa memiliki mobil Rolls Royce miliknya, tetapi mereka harus membayar lima puluh ribu dolar jika kalah!

programme.title: Mr. Funnybone
programme.desc: Saksikan kelucuan Funny Bone saat ia berusaha memenangkan hati seorang wanita tangguh. Bersama dengan sahabat karibnya, Big Potato, seorang lelaki gagah yang selalu mengalami berbagai hal konyol.

programme.title: Murder Plot
programme.desc: Saat merencanakan pembalasan terhadap Huan yang kejam, istri Shen Lang mengacaukan konferensi dan harus diantar pulang. Dalam perjalanan pulang, mereka terjebak dalam perangkap Huan yang mematikan.

programme.title: The Happy Trio
programme.desc: Li Ching aktris terbaik di era nya berperan sebagai Ah Chiao adalah seorang gadis dari desa yang tersesat di kota, yang berteman dengan seorang pemondok yang baik hati dan seorang mantan aktor.

programme.title: Six Assassins
programme.desc: Tuan Li Ming adalah penguasa nan kejam yang menindas rakyat. Bahkan Kaisar yang merupakan saudaranya pun tak bisa menghentikannya. Pendekar pedang Mu menyamar sebagai penjaga Li Ming dan berencana untuk membunuhnya.

programme.title: Love Without End
programme.desc: Penyanyi Qing Qing dan arsitek Tang Peng Nan adalah pasangan serasi. Ia mengorbankan dirinya untuk membantu Peng Nan pada saat keluarganya mengalami kesulitan. Namun, mereka putus karena kesalahpahaman.

programme.title: Rose, Be My Love
programme.desc: Berlatar pada malam penyerbuan Jepang di Hong Kong, film tentang kisah cinta yang tragis produksi Shaw Brothers ini dibintangi oleh Li Ting dan Kwan Shan sebagai sepasang kekasih yang terpisahkan oleh perang.

programme.title: My Name Ain't Suzie
programme.desc: Mei Li muda bekerja sebagai pelayan bar di Wanchai untuk mencari nafkah. Ia jatuh cinta pada Jimmy saat bertemu dengannya di sana. Namun, Mei Li merasa sangat terpukul saat Jimmy harus pergi.

programme.title: My Dream Boat
programme.desc: Sebuah film yang berkisah tentang sebuah hubungan cinta nan rumit antara sekelompok anak muda yang terjerat dalam ikatan cinta dan emosi.

programme.title: Call Of The Sea
programme.desc: Seorang nelayan muda bernama Chin Hu jatuh cinta dengan teman masa kecilnya, Hsiao Yu. Namun, putra satu-satunya preman di sana terpukau pada kecantikan Hsiao Yu dan mencoba segala cara untuk mendekatinya.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Fai, yang pernah menjadi juara dunia tinju, melarikan diri ke Makau dari rentenir dan secara tak terduga bertemu Qi, seorang pemuda yang bertekad memenangkan pertandingan tinju.

programme.title: Song Of The Assassins
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh mengemban misi pertamanya sambil diam-diam menyelidiki penyebab pembantaian keluarganya beberapa tahun silam. Namun, ia malah terjerat dalam suatu konspirasi politik saat menjalankan misi.

programme.title: How To Choose A Royal Bride
programme.desc: Kaisar muda Kangxi sedang berusaha memilih seorang istri. Ibunya telah mengatur agar beberapa wanita muda yang tersedia mengunjunginya sehingga ia dapat memilih.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: Seorang prajurit muda Tiongkok mencuri pedang dari seorang pendekar pedang terkenal dan kemudian melarikan diri ke dunia petualangan romantis bersama seorang pria misterius di perbatasan negara.

programme.title: Fight Back To School 2
programme.desc: Sing mengundurkan diri dari kepolisian setelah diturunkan pangkatnya ke bagian pengaturan lalu lintas, sementara rekannya ditugaskan dalam misi yang melibatkan teroris asing yang mengancam akan mengebom sebuah sekolah di Hong Kong, sehingga Sing memutuskan untuk membantu dengan menyamar di sekolah yang sama.

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: Sebelum memenangkan pujian dalam film laga berkat aksi-aksi mereka yang berani, para bintang ini menjalani tahun-tahun penuh darah, keringat, dan air mata saat berlatih di bawah bimbingan Master Yu yang kejam.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing dan kakaknya, Ma Tai Chueng, tiba di Shanghai untuk mencari peruntungan. Berteman dengan seorang gangster berkuasa, ia diberi klub malam sebagai imbalan atas penyelamatan nyawa Tam Sei. Sayangnya, seorang gangster lain juga menginginkan wilayah tersebut.

programme.title: Let's Have A Baby
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah menarik tentang kerumitan dalam menciptakan anak, yang menampilkan penampilan komedi langka oleh Alex Man Chi Leung.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Mantan kapten SWAT, Dong Gu, menderita kehilangan penglihatan traumatis kala gagal menjalankan misi. Namun, musuh bebuyutannya muncul dan membuat putrinya dalam bahaya. Ia pun harus berjuang menyelamatkan putrinya.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Seorang fotografer terjerat oleh sesosok 'wanita berbaju merah' hingga menyebabkan kerabatnya tewas satu per satu. Ia pun bersumpah untuk mencari tahu kebenarannya saat gadis yang ia sukai juga tewas secara misterius.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Liang Pao-erh bergabung dengan Spinsters' Club yang riang ketika dia menemukan suaminya berselingkuh. Terlepas dari wajah bahagia yang ditampilkan oleh saudara perempuannya, di balik itu semua, masing-masing dari mereka diam-diam merindukan seorang pria dalam hidupnya.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Liang Pao-erh bergabung dengan Spinsters' Club yang riang ketika dia menemukan suaminya berselingkuh. Terlepas dari wajah bahagia yang ditampilkan oleh saudara perempuannya, di balik itu semua, masing-masing dari mereka diam-diam merindukan seorang pria dalam hidupnya.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: Seorang Pendeta Taois tidak senang ketika rekan Pendeta Buddha-nya pindah ke sebelah rumahnya. Mereka sering terlibat perselisihan dan duel, tetapi segera harus mengatasi masalah mereka ketika seorang vampir keluar dari peti matinya dan mendatangkan malapetaka di pedesaan.

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Chen Li Pin, putra dari pengusaha yang culun, mendapat kekecewaan usai mencari jodoh di Hawaii bersama temannya. Kemudian, secara tak sengaja mereka terjebak dalam sebuah pertukaran identitas yang kacau.

programme.title: Iceman: The Time Traveler
programme.desc: Pengawal kekaisaran dan ketiga teman masa kecilnya yang berkhianat, yang diperintahkan untuk memburunya, secara tidak sengaja terkubur dan membeku dalam waktu. 400 tahun kemudian berlalu dan mereka dicairkan, melanjutkan pertempuran yang mereka tinggalkan.

programme.title: Out Of The Dark
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tua tewas setelah terjatuh dari sebuah gedung dan arwahnya menghantui tempat tersebut. Merasa ketakutan, para penjaga keamanan setempat pun meminta bantuan Leo si pemburu hantu beserta asistennya.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Pergantian rezim di Leka memicu konflik di dunia hitam & putih. Polisi mengirim Zheng Zha menyusup ke geng Song Bang, tanpa tahu pihak lain sudah siap membalas dendam.

programme.title: Challenge Of The Gamesters
programme.desc: Wong Jing menciptakan genre film perjudian hampir sendirian, dan dalam salah satu film laris awalnya, Shih Hsien memimpin pemeran bintang dalam kisah tentang mata-mata, taipan, dan gadis cantik.

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: Seorang polisi mengandalkan seorang pencuri mobil muda untuk menangkap empat gangster yang berencana merampok seorang pedagang kaya untuk mendapatkan sejumlah besar uang.

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: Seorang wanita diperkosa dan dibunuh selama Perang Dunia II. Empat puluh tahun kemudian, ia kembali untuk menghantui para penganiayanya dari Rumah Besar Tao Tao. Seorang profesor dan keluarganya pindah ke rumah itu, hanya untuk kemudian roh-roh tersebut mengambil putra mereka.

programme.title: From Beijing With Love
programme.desc: Seorang mata-mata Tiongkok yang telah pensiun selama sepuluh tahun dan mencari nafkah sebagai tukang daging dikirim ke Hong Kong untuk menemukan tengkorak Tyrannosaurus rex yang dicuri.

programme.title: Open The Coffin
programme.desc: Sebuah film misteri supranatural dengan seorang detektif yang menyelidiki pembunuhan yang tampaknya merupakan akibat dari kutukan.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: Kisah tentang pengalaman imigran ilegal dari Tiongkok daratan yang berhasil sampai ke Hong Kong untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: Kisah tentang pengalaman imigran ilegal dari Tiongkok daratan yang berhasil sampai ke Hong Kong untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: Marbles, seorang anak berusia 10 tahun, menyaksikan pembunuhan seorang wanita muda.

programme.title: Gangster, The Cop, The Devil
programme.desc: Detektif Lin membentuk unit khusus untuk menangkap perampok motor dan sindikat di balik aksi pencurian di Foshan usai istrinya yang hamil ditabrak oleh perampok motor.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang wanita berusia akhir dua puluhan yang menemukan kembali bakatnya dalam bertinju setelah lama absen. Secara tak terduga, ia bertemu dengan mantan pelatih tinjunya dan keduanya bekerja sama untuk membantunya mencapai babak final pertandingan tinju profesional.

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: Kepala keluarga kaya meninggal dunia dan dalam wasiatnya mewariskan kekayaannya kepada putrinya. Putranya marah dan menggunakan seorang pengumpul sampah yang mirip dengan saudara perempuannya untuk mencuri kekayaan tersebut. Putra paman juga menginginkan bagian dari kekayaan itu dan memaksa seorang pencuri kecil untuk mencuri wasiat tersebut demi rencana jahatnya.

programme.title: The Fate Of Reunion
programme.desc: Siluman Ular Hijau memperoleh pencerahan di bawah bimbingan Dao Qing dan perlahan jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, pengabdiannya pada Dao Qing membuatnya bereinkarnasi dan mengalami rasa sakit akibat kematian.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey: Cinderella
programme.desc: Kelanjutan yang berbelit-belit dari petualangan Raja Kera yang kini menjadi manusia dan melakukan perjalanan waktu, yang berupaya memenuhi takdir ilahinya.

programme.title: Behind The Yellow Line
programme.desc: Seorang pria muda yang pemalu dan pekerja kantoran, bertemu dengan seorang wanita cantik dan ambisius yang sedang mengejar karirnya, serta seorang pria lain yang ramah namun penuh rahasia. Pertemuan ini membawa mereka ke dalam perjalanan emosional yang kompleks, penuh dengan kebingungan, kesalahpahaman, dan penemuan diri.

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: Demi menolong putranya yang diculik oleh jaringan perdagangan manusia, petugas polisi Zhang bekerja sama dengan seorang wanita misterius guna memecahkan sindikat kejahatan internasional dan menyelamatkan putranya.

Ketika Marla meninggal, Bruno tidak dapat mengatasi kematiannya. Juga nilai-nilai seperti ketertiban, tanggung jawab, cinta, dan kepedulian yang diwakilinya. Kedua saudara itu menciptakan dunia mereka sendiri. Namun segera dunia anarkis itu terancam oleh dunia luar. programme.desc: Ketika semua jalur komunikasi terputus dengan sebuah fasilitas penelitian ilmiah rahasia yang berlokasi di bekas laboratorium biokimia Uni Soviet, sebuah perusahaan militer swasta dibentuk untuk memasuki fasilitas tersebut guna mencari dan mengevakuasi dokter kepala.

programme.title: Deadly Vendetta
programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; namun, segera terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya

programme.title: Fire Twister
programme.desc: Sebuah pusaran api buatan manusia melanda Los Angeles, meninggalkan kota itu dalam keadaan hancur berantakan. Namun, belum semuanya hilang ketika sekelompok orang asing bersatu untuk menghentikan kehancuran tersebut.

Di sisi lain, sekte kiamat berusaha menyabotase proyek tersebut dengan keyakinan bahwa hal itu merupakan “kehendak Tuhan” dan membiarkan penduduk Bumi dilalap oleh radiasi intens dari gelombang tersebut.

programme.title: Dogtanian & The 3 Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dia segera berteman dengan tiga musketeer (Porthos, Athos, dan Aramis), serta menyelamatkan Juliette, seorang dayang Ratu Anne dari Austria.

programme.title: Space Racers
programme.desc: Bergabunglah bersama para murid di Stardust Space Academy saat mereka menjalani berbagai misi untuk mempelajari fakta-fakta baru sambil bersenang-senang. Ditemani karakter-karakter yang menarik dan menyenangkan, termasuk pemimpin Space Racers dan Hawk.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: Paradise City
programme.desc: Ryan Swan harus mengukir jalan melalui dunia kriminal di Hawaii untuk membalaskan dendam pada gembong yang membunuh ayahnya.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: Obvious Child
programme.desc: Kehamilan tak terencana seorang komedian berusia dua puluhan memaksanya menghadapi kenyataan sebagai wanita mandiri untuk pertama kalinya.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure

Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

The Peacocks' young daughter Lily loves splashing around in water, so Alan creates an integrated seating area with a built-in waterfall in one corner by cleverly redesigning the space and tasks Frances with building a beautiful focal point using a free standing sheet of water surrounded by lush plants - however, the cleverest trick of all is David's archway over the path which doubles as a water sheet for the kids to run through and enjoy.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot O'Leary arrives in Sligo, Yeats country, where the mountains, sea and sky feel like they've barely changed since the poet put them into verse. Local guide Tracey brings that world to life, tracing Yeats' Irish-English existence and the places that shaped him. From there, Dermot heads out onto the bay with Glen and Aisling of Sligo Oysters, getting his hands dirty on a working oyster farm before cooking the catch over an open flame on the shore. In Sligo town, he meets man-of-the-town chef Anthony Gray, who leads him through two of its most treasured food institutions: Clarke's, a family butcher of long standing, and Cosgrove & Sons, a provisions store that looks and feels like it hasn't changed in a century. With their haul gathered, Anthony and Dermot head to his flagship restaurant Eala Bán, where they cook up a proudly Irish Surf 'N' Turf.

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: James arrives in the misty gardens of Claude Monet's house in Giverny and walks across its iconic Japanese bridge to gaze at the water lilies made famous by the artist - Monet loved his food and had quite a brood to feed, with he and his second wife having had eight children between them. Thinking of this hungry horde, James sets up his mobile kitchen nearby to cook a delicious dish of crab - James's self-confessed idea of heaven - and dulse. There is a peek inside Monet's kitchen as James hears how he collected recipes from the various restaurants at which he dined - meanwhile, Eric Guerin serves pike - one of Monet's favourite fish - at his restaurant Le Jardin des Plumes just down the road. In a nearby orchard on the day of their annual harvest, James prepares an autumnal treat of apple doughnuts - when back home, he then cooks a Normandy tart and a very original omelette.

Flavoured with rosemary, salt and olives, Prue declares that this is a dish you should definitely find the time to make - meanwhile, John builds a dovecote for the garden which proves to be a bigger and bolder project than any that have come before, and Prue's food hero is a cake-maker who made a royal wedding cake. programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot brings his journey to a close on the surf-battered shores of Strandhill, paddling out with Rebelle Surf into the cold Atlantic to understand why these waves draw people from across the world. He meets a couple who've eaten their way around the globe and landed here, bringing the bold, smoky flavours of the Basque country to the beach in Strandhill. Together they cook turbot over fire, a dish where Ireland and Spain meet to make something delicious. Then it's Dermot's turn. Joined by a host of faces he's met along the way, he takes everything he's seen and eaten along the series. He cooks a proper feast: fresh seafood, a deep, warming stew, and a fruit dessert that carries the sweetness of the whole journey. From the Causeway Coastal Route to the Wild Atlantic Way, it's a meal that tells the full story of the road behind him.

Romesh really wants to connect to his Sri Lankan heritage after growing up in Crawley, while South Londoner Rob is simply hoping that his family aren't all 'wrong'uns' - however, things don't start well for Rob as he finds out his family in the past are well acquainted with the local prison before finding out that his hero ancestor turned the family's fortunes around with some Beckett determination and grit. programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The gripping crime drama continues with an episode in which there may be more to a seemingly cut-and-dried case than meets the eye. When call girl Katka Cizek is found dead in a pool of blood in an upmarket apartment, only one of her admirers seems to fit the bill for the culprit. He was with her on the night of her death, he does not have an alibi and he has everything to lose if his secret obsession with her were to be revealed. The evidence against him seems clear, and when the matter comes to trial, crown prosecutor Alesha Phillips is given the reins to lead the cross-examination. But as she looks further into the case, Alesha begins to suspect that someone has reason to frame the accused. As she digs deeper, determined to find the truth, she uncovers a shattering betrayal which proves that there are no winners in this case.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The police are called to investigate a horrifying gun attack which has left a nightclub peppered with bullets and two victims bleeding out on the floor. But the shocks do not end there, as the shooters begin a deadly rampage through the streets of London. With the media swarming over the case and a hostage in danger, Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin find themselves up against the clock as they desperately hunt down the Bonnie-and-Clyde duo responsible for the bloody massacre. When the violent pair are brought to trial, defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone claims that one of the two suspects was more innocent victim than vicious killer. Was the defendant acting out of fear after being beaten and bullied into submission by her partner-in-crime? Aware that there are two sides to every story, the team are under pressure to ensure that someone is held responsible for a murderous spree which has claimed five lives.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. The owner of Easterly Grange Hotel has died as an annual festival begins in the hotel's gardens - Barnaby attends the funeral and learns that the manager of the hotel is missing. The reading of the will reveals that the hotel has been divided among the missing manager, his glamorous wife, the hotel chef and the hotel accountant - after a dog appears with the severed hand of the missing manager, Barnaby begins some serious enquiries. Threatening notes are soon delivered to each of those named in the will - and accidents befall them one by one. One is poisoned by mushrooms, another accidentally shot, another crushed by a falling drinks cabinet and two nearly killed when their van's are sabotaged - Barnaby discovers that there had been a new will entrusted to the hotel manager but that it disappeared when he disappeared. Could that explain why the will's beneficiaries have all suffered fatal accidents... and who the destroying angel that has arranged the deaths is?
