programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Sensing danger surrounding her sister Carrie-Louise, Ruth Van Rydock enlists the help of her old friend Miss Marple - when Carrie-Louise's beloved stepbrother is then murdered during a dress rehearsal of an amateur stage show, Jane has to draw from her deep understanding of human character in order to unpick the conjuring trick played out by the murderer and reveal their identity.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama. It's the winter of 1971 - the team are called to investigate the violent and peculiar murder of an Oxford college don, but when Thursday makes an unexpected discovery, Endeavour's suitability to work on the case is compromised and he is sidelined. Meanwhile, things at home become quite tense for Thursday and Win when they receive disturbing news from abroad, and although officially off the clock, Endeavour follows a lead that unravels an intricate plot beyond his wildest imagination. Endeavour finds himself at an abandoned hotel where the body of another fellow bus passenger is found murdered in the same peculiar way as the college don - trapped with a group he can't be sure to trust, Endeavour slowly comes to learn the disturbing truth about those he finds himself amongst. With Endeavour in danger, the buck rests with Thursday to put together the final pieces of the puzzle.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Susan Bartlett's body is discovered in a wood, villagers assume she killed herself because she could not have children. However, when it comes to light that her suicide note - in the form of an email - was sent too late, Barnaby soon finds himself in the midst of witchcraft, ancient potions, infidelity and land feuds.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. When the bellringers of Midsomer Wellow each win 5000 pounds on a horse called Ring-a-Ding, they see it as a good omen for success in the forthcoming Striking Competition until one of their number is found shot dead in the belfry - Greg Tutt was a serial womaniser recently dumped by his wife Sue, but DCI Tom Barnaby suspects that there is more to the murder than affairs of the heart. Retired RAF officer Reggie Barton hates the bellringers and tells his son Hugh that he is leaving his estate to the church on condition that they are stopped - bellringer Emma Tysoe is then brutally murdered on her wedding day with words from an ancient village rhyme left at the scene. Frances Le Bon and the rest of the team receive letters with other lines from the poem and fear they are next - as Barnaby's wife Joyce pours through Midsomer Wellow's history books with the help of parish archivist Maisie Gooch, the detectives must solve a riddle before the killer strikes again...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the brutal murder of young physiotherapist Lizzie Faulkner, who was gunned down at a luxury country retreat - in a story of betrayal, guilt and the need for atonement, Vera must move quickly to avoid another tragedy. Meanwhile, Joe finally makes amends with the demons from his own past.

programme.title: The Lady
programme.desc: Drama based on real events. Jane believes that marriage with boyfriend Tommy is just around the corner, but cracks soon appear in the relationship and a toxic pattern starts to emerge. Now living together, Jane and Tommy try to integrate into each other's social circles - however, some of their friends are disapproving of the relationship. Confronted with the sudden appearance of a ghost from her past at a party, Jane starts to unravel and her relationship with Tommy hangs in the balance - on a make-or-break holiday in the south of France with Tommy's family, tensions reach a head with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: The Lady
programme.desc: The conclusion of the drama based on real events. Jane's fairytale falls apart when she finds herself at the centre of a police investigation - released on bail, Jane reconnects with an old friend from palace life whose unexpected support gives her hope. Back in London, Jane faces a trial at the Old Bailey - as the prosecution and defence battle it out, Jane starts to lose her grip on reality and makes a shocking allegation when she takes to the stand as the prosecution continue to put pressure on her about the inconsistencies in her story.

programme.title: The Protectors

programme.title: Battlebots

With many of the top seeds eliminated in a series of shocking upsets, there may be more surprises in store as one team hoists the Giant Nut and is forever honoured in the BattleBots Hall of Fame.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme fishing series. Jeremy Wade travels to Colombia, one of the most dangerous countries in South America, to search for a river monster that is thought to have dragged a honeymoon bride to her death - his investigation begins with the usual suspects, but when none of those fish prove capable of inflicting the wounds found on the bride, a key witness turns the search on its head. Jeremy then conducts an experiment to prove that his new yet unlikely suspect is capable of dragging an adult under the water before pushing his fishing gear past breaking point to discover the river monster known as the Colombian Slasher...

programme.title: Shaun of the Dead
programme.desc: Much-lauded comedy which fuses the style and copious bloodshed of classic zombie films with observational suburban humour. Shaun is a useless but likeable thirty-something who works in an electronics shop in Crouch End - he doesn't get much respect from his fellow staff even though he's standing in as temporary boss, his girlfriend Liz has had enough of his lack of direction and penchant for downing pints in the local pub, and he also doesn't get on with his stepdad. Things get worse when the living dead make their appearance and threaten to spread their zombie curse across the nation... will Shaun be able to rise from his sofa to save the lives of the two women that he loves?

programme.desc: From 2024. Jack Black returns as Po, the world's most unlikely kung fu master, in a hilarious and hard-hitting new chapter in DreamWorks Animation's comedy franchise: Kung Fu Panda 4.

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: From 2022. A young boy discovers the secret headquarters of the world's most powerful superhero - hidden right under his home! – and must defend it with his friends while the villains attack.

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: From 2022. Two American fighter pilots risk their lives during the Korean War and become the fleet's most decorated pilots.

programme.title: Mormon Mom Gone Wrong: The Ruby Franke Story
programme.desc: From 2024. A successful mommy vlogger is captivated by a crazy therapist who becomes part of the family and decides to destroy it. Inspired by real events.

programme.title: We Live in Time
programme.desc: From 2024. By a funny coincidence, the quick-witted star chef Almut meets newly divorced Tobias. They fall in love, and build a safe home for their little family. But one day they receive a message that changes their lives drastically.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: From 2023. After a fantastic first date, Bea and Ben's fierce attraction suddenly turns cold. When they are unexpectedly reunited at a wedding in Australia, they end up pretending to be a couple.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: Set in 2025. A kung fu prodigy trains with two legends to face a new rival in an epic martial arts duel.

programme.title: Caught Stealing
programme.desc: Set in 2025. Hank, a former baseball star, works as a bartender, has an amazing girlfriend, and his team is aiming for the championship. But when the neighbor asks him to look after a cat, he is suddenly surrounded by gangsters.

programme.title: Never Let Go
programme.desc: From 2024. When evil spreads, the home of a mother and her two sons becomes their only refuge. Bound together by rope, they vow never to let go, but when one of the sons begins to question the threat outside, the battle begins for ove

programme.title: The Crow
programme.desc: From 2024. Soulmates Eric and Shelly are brutally murdered when the demons from her dark past overtake them. Eric gets a chance to save the love of his life, but must sacrifice himself and travel through the worlds of the living and the dead to get revenge.

programme.title: Night Swim
programme.desc: From 2024. The producers of M3GAN plunge from the timer into the deepest darkness of horror with the supernatural thriller Night Swim. Based on the 2014 short film by Rod Blackhurst and Bryce McGuire.

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: From 2024. Donald Trump started his real estate business in 1970s and 80s New York with the help of infamous lawyer Roy Cohn. Determined to step out of his father's shadow, the young Trump met Cohn, who became an important figure in his life.

programme.title: You're Not You
programme.desc: From 2014. The successful concert pianist Kate, who is affected by the incurable disease ALS. Her family offers the best carers, but Kate falls for the awkward and completely incompetent Bec.

programme.title: The Tourist
programme.desc: From 2010. Frank is an American tourist visiting Italy to heal a broken heart. Elise is a unique woman who intentionally crosses his path. With the beautiful Venice as a backdrop, they enter into a dangerous flirtation.

programme.title: The passionate liar
programme.desc: From 1997. Lawyer Fletcher Reede keeps making promises to his son he can't keep. But when Fletcher forgets his son's birthday, which he has promised to come to, his son gets enough.

programme.title: My best friend's wedding
programme.desc: From 1997. Julianne and Michael have a long friendship behind them and have, among other things, occasionally been lovers. They also have an unwritten agreement that they will marry if neither of them has found "the right one" by the time they turn 28.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: From 2023. Maddie thinks she has found the solution to her financial problems when she discovers an exciting job ad: A wealthy couple is looking for someone to "date" their introverted 19-year-old, Percy.

programme.title: Beautiful Creatures
programme.desc: From 2013. Lena has moved to a small town in the southern states. There she is bullied by the townspeople because she is related to the Satanist Macon Ravenwood, but a boy who longs to move falls in love with her.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: From 2006. Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett both work underground in hot Florida, where they penetrate the dark and dollar-rich depths of the drug world.

programme.title: Stillwater
programme.desc: From 2021. Unemployed rig worker Bill Baker travels from Oklahoma to Marseille to clear the name of his daughter Allison, who is imprisoned for a murder she claims she did not commit.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: From 2025. Lucy is a young and ambitious matchmaker who thinks she knows everything about love. But when she meets a tall, dark and handsome stranger on the same night as her broke ex, she is at a loss.

programme.title: Fatale
programme.desc: From 2020. After a wild night together, Derrick, a successful sports agent, sees his perfect life slowly disappear when he discovers that the sexy and mysterious woman he risked everything for is a strong-willed police detective.

programme.title: I think I love you
programme.desc: From 2025. A coming-of-age drama about Anders, a gifted dancer shaped by trauma and passion. Through dance, he confronts his past to find healing.

programme.title: Letters to Juliet
programme.desc: From 2010. Do you believe in the great love? Sophie is on holiday with her Italian boyfriend in Verona - Romeo and Juliet's hometown - when she stumbles across a dusty love letter, written 50 years ago.

programme.title: My best friend's wedding
programme.desc: From 1997. Julianne and Michael have a long friendship behind them and have, among other things, occasionally been lovers. They also have an unwritten agreement that they will marry if neither of them has found "the right one" by the time they turn 28.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: From 2003. During the funeral of a British spy, all the spies present die in an assassination attempt. Now there is only one British spy left: Johnny English, Britain's last hope.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: From 2012. Snow White the only one in the country who is more beautiful than the evil queen. This is more than the queen can bear, so she decides that Snow White must die and sends a huntsman to kill her.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: From 1993. In an astonishing theme park, on a secluded island, extinct dinosaurs are recreated with genetic engineering. But the theme park quickly turns into a death trap for the people on the island.

programme.title: Mr. Beans ferie
programme.desc: From 2007. Mr. Bean wins a trip to France and a video camera in a lottery. Once in France, Bean runs into problems as he does not speak French.

programme.title: Long Shot
programme.desc: From 2019. Fred Flarsky is a journalist "who has taken a little break", but during the reunion with his first crush, Charlotte Field, he charms her.

programme.title: The castle in the air that blew up
programme.desc: From 2009. Lisbeth Salander is in hospital after being shot in the head. The police start the investigation, but as the truth about her past life emerges, a conspiracy at the highest level is also revealed.

programme.title: Johnny English Reborn
programme.desc: From 2011. This time he fights against international assassins who are after the Chinese Prime Minister.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: From 2025. Best friends Nick and Will, along with NFL players Marquis and Corey, set out on a fishing trip over 100 kilometers off Florida. When they try to free a stuck anchor before a violent storm, the boat capsizes and throws them into the icy water.

programme.title: Rampage: Big Meets Bigger
programme.desc: From 2018. The primatologist Davis is best friends with a kind gorilla, George. But suddenly George changes and a giant flying wolf appears. Davis must find out what's going on - and stop it.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: From 2018. Single mother Stephanie befriends the glamorous, fascinating and mysterious Emily. Suddenly, Emily disappears and Stephanie begins to investigate what has happened.

programme.title: Sicario 2: Soldier
programme.desc: From 2018. The drug war on the US-Mexico border is escalating, and the cartels have begun smuggling terrorists across the border. But FBI agent Graver is determined to win, and any means are allowed.

programme.title: Make a pie
programme.desc: From 2024. When Anette and Ben's daughter gets a role in a film with movie star Alicia, Ben is quickly attracted to Alicia. As Anette's suspicions about Ben's crush on Alicia intensify, their secrets and lies threaten to come to light

programme.desc: Sebuah upaya pembunuhan yang gagal di Harbin, Cina pada tahun 1909 mengubah arah sejarah. Kini dua agen JBI harus menemukan hubungan antara benda tersebut dengan sebuah artefak Korea kuno.

programme.desc: Film Runway 34 terinspirasi dari kisah nyata tentang seorang pilot handal, Kapten Vikrant Khanna, yang mengambil jalur penerbangan nan misterius setelah lepas landas dari bandara internasional.

programme.title: Farrey
programme.desc: Niyati, yatim piatu jenius yang mendapat beasiswa di sekolah elit, terseret skandal kecurangan ujian saat teman-teman kayanya memanfaatkan kecerdasannya untuk mencontek.

programme.title: Khichdi 2: Mission...
programme.desc: Penampilan para pemain dan aksi konyol yang tak masuk akal akan sering membuat Anda tertawa.

programme.title: Farrey
programme.desc: Niyati, yatim piatu jenius yang mendapat beasiswa di sekolah elit, terseret skandal kecurangan ujian saat teman-teman kayanya memanfaatkan kecerdasannya untuk mencontek.

programme.title: Khichdi 2: Mission...
programme.desc: Penampilan para pemain dan aksi konyol yang tak masuk akal akan sering membuat Anda tertawa.

programme.title: Runway 34

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time in Enduropark Training – Shirin takes part in an Enduro; Take part in off-road training at the Enduropark Hechlingen and realize that it is anything but a picnic. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The latest innovations in the automotive industry have been presented in Paris since 1898. This makes the Paris Motor Show the oldest trade fair in the world and provides an insight into the automotive world of tomorrow. One attempt by manufacturers is to replace the traditional combustion engine with alternative drives. Mercedes-Benz founded the Generation EQ sub-brand specifically for this purpose. Under the slogan "think new", Volkswagen wants to introduce 20 new electric models by 2020 and finally put the diesel scandal behind it. In addition to the drive of the future, Perfect Ride presents the manufacturers' design visions. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Rearview mirror puts the NSU Ro 80 in the spotlight today. With its revolutionary aerodynamic body and its new engine technology, a Wankel engine, it caused a sensation when it first appeared in 1967. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Assistance systems that are normal in cars usually seem exotic or even unthinkable on two-wheelers. However, this no longer applies to the blind spot warning system, which BMW is now offering for the first time. Ideal for the dense traffic in big cities, the home territory of the new maxi scooter C 650 GT. We test the new 60 hp large scooter including the assistance system in Valencia and find out in heavy rush hour traffic whether Side View Assist is an annoying paternalism - or perhaps a real help that could soon also come to motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good condition, others a little polished, the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: For the first time, it was possible to look over the shoulders of the developers for five years. From the idea to the finished car. After a design competition, eight models are shortlisted. Eight comparable vehicles will be presented to 500 test customers. A jury will propose two of the models for the final. The last big design decision has been made. Today there is a winner. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: How will we transport goods and people in the future? The pack mules on our roads are also evolving and moving with the times. VW is working with Ford to save costs and pool expertise on the new van. At Volvo, safety has always been a priority – and that also applies to its trucks. And 5 exciting facts about the Mercedes eCitaro NMC4. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar F-Type, Aston Martin Vanquish Volante or Bentley Continental, English convertibles are elegant and exclusive and, they are fun. English convertibles enjoy cult status all over the world because, after all, the fun of open and fast two-seaters was invented in England. English roadsters offer more sporting spirit than any other, equipped with power, luxury and elegance, they are the most fascinating convertibles of all. Rolls Royce Phantom Drophead, Jaguar F-Type or Aston Martin Vanquish Volante, Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking English convertibles of all time. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The US brand Cadillac from Detroit stands for the American way of drive and exuberant luxury made in the USA. The Cadillac Series 62 Convertible from 1949 was the first US car to have the famous and often quoted tail fins. A beefy V8 engine, automatic transmission and electric top are a given for a Caddy of this era. Classic Ride revives the American Way of Drive with the tailfin monster. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In addition to the classic Sportback variant, Audi also offers the A3 as a sedan. We subjected this model to extensive practical testing. Also: the Lexus RX, the revised version of the premium SUV from Toyota's luxury brand on the test site in Ibiza. And: Volkswagen is also launching a new model variant of the e-Up! after. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: They are square and angular, round and beautiful. Solid and safe, indestructible and comfortable: The old Swedes from Volvo. Every model is a classic, every model is a car to dream about. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: When you glide the car on two tires, that's it, we're on tour. Today in Dinslaken and that is the hometown of the Bosslé Helldrivers and it has been a huge family business for forty years. They show us a crazy stunt show and we're there! (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The coupe shape makes cars sexy. It's partly a question of faith and partly a question of utility whether you choose a classic two-door coupé like the Mercedes E400 - or the big brother CLS with four doors. The trendsetter of the coupé-limousine has had a number of imitators. The VW Arteon competes with the CLS in a different price segment. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Today a treat for sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight. And an insight into a life on two wheels: Ernst Jakob Henne set 76 world speed records on BMW machines. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. Lotus blossoms, lowriders and lascivious sluts - these are among the topics in tuning today. The test team goes full throttle again and chases the Komo-Tec Elise with 230 hp on the Nordschleife. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: This episode of Stunt Heroes is all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch called Knobi. He drives over a ramp at 50 km/h and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other. The dangerous thing about the stunt: several gasoline barrels explode at the same time! If something goes wrong, Knobi is also in danger.... (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: At the Retro Classics in Stuttgart, presenter Martin Utberg is one of the crowd pullers at the trade fair with his daily stage talks in Hall 10. He welcomes two prominent guests per day in front of a large live audience and talks to them about motorsport, personal experiences and the fascination of classic automobiles. In part 2, Martin speaks to several guests. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a race track icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. In 1997 Ferrari celebrated the company's 50th birthday. At that time, Wolfgang Rother followed the Ferrari myth and collected his first driving impressions with the Ferrari 550 Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes part in the Spalatin Historic, a one-day classic car rally in aid of a good cause. Together with organizer Stefan von Heyden, Martin discovers the Franconian region. During the various breaks, entertaining special stages ensure many smiling faces among participants and spectators. In this program, Top Speed ​​also takes viewers to Lucerne, where Martin gets involved behind the scenes at a classic car auction by the Oldtimer Galerie Toffen at the Swiss Classic World. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Today's show is all about: premium performance. Because these two crackers deliver both in their own, unique way and with future-oriented drives. We were exclusively at the world premiere of the Mercedes CLA in Rome and revealed all the details about design, technology and features. Also: Six exciting facts about the ultimate station wagon, the BMW M5 Touring! (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Supermoto: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship
FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: Bitter fights for championship titles, fierce duels for race victories and even disputes between teammates: motorsport has been characterized by feuds since its early days. Even in Formula 1 there are always heated rivalries and duels. The Racing Files looks at the exciting battles for world championship titles in the premier class of formula racing. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026 Qualifying

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Another total cancellation of the race day on the Isle of Man due to the weather, but instead we had the opportunity to talk in more detail with the Crowe brothers and Davey Todd and take a look back at the most spectacular races of the week. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: With the first Supersport race shortened to 3 laps, the question was whether Hicky could once again demonstrate his dominance from the Superbike race, whether Lee Johnston could repeat his success from last year or whether Michael Dunlup would live up to his role as favorite here. It was a hot fight! (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT
programme.desc: In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. We show what idea lies behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in the practical test. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by the industrial park at the Nürburgring. Headquarters of Phoenix Racing GmbH. From here, the team of Swabia-born Ernst Moser shakes up the world's race tracks. The founding members' obsession with starting their own racing team turned into a successful company in just a few years. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Java House Grand Prix of Arlington, Streets of Arlington, Texas

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Of what used to be over 300 tractor manufacturers, only three remain in Germany today. One of them is DEUTZ. In addition to the change in tractor construction from the simple tractor to the all-rounder with over 100 possible work steps, Made in Germany also shows the lean and efficient production and assembly, which is still largely manual work. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: IAA Mobility 2021 – A trade fair is moving
programme.desc: Something had to happen! New name, new location, new trade fair concept. After the decline in visitors in recent years, the International Motor Show is moving from Frankfurt to Munich. In addition to the exhibition halls, visitors can visit the free open space or take test drives. Over 100 premieres from the automotive sector show where the mobility of the future is headed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar, Rolls Royce or Bentley, Aston Martin or McLaren, Dream Cars - England shows the most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, the cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and unique British flair. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It is the "Holy Grail" for Porsche fans and the first Porsche to ever bear the famous name of the design genius from Austria: The Type 64, a racing car from 1938 that is based on the Volkswagen developed by Professor Ferdinand Porsche. Only two of the streamlined cars were built and were intended to take part in a race from Berlin to Rome. But the war intervened... (channel info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Le Mans. The toughest car race in the world. Porsche has competed in the 24-hour classic every year since 1951. The prototypes from Zuffenhausen won 16 times – more often than any other manufacturer in Le Mans history. There are also over 100 class victories. No other brand has shaped the race like Porsche. And no other race is as closely associated with Porsche as Le Mans. Porsche at Le Mans is an incredible success story. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: With Perfect Ride the horsepower is thrown. Armin Schwarz's tires glow on ice and snow in Finland. Drift until the snow watch comes. Also: An extravagant duel at the CES in Vegas: Mercedes, the Warrior of the Stars versus Audi, Lord of the Rings. The latest technological wonders in direct comparison. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Half a century of Ferrari. Rearview Mirror gets to the bottom of the Ferrari myth and takes a close look at the red racers from Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Pascal Kapp's rallies are different from all other classic car rallies. These include the Upper Bavarian Master Classic, the Saxon Master Classic, the 10 Lakes Rally and, last but not least, the one-day rally 333 minute rally, which - as the name suggests - has to be driven in exactly 333 minutes. A day full of driving fun for the participants with a wide variety of special tests guarantees the best entertainment for the top speed spectators in this episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Fine tuning of superlatives – the Mansory Conquistador. A car for 750,000 euros. Pure power and no trace of understatement. With the Mercedes CLK DTM AMG the road becomes a race track. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6

programme.title: Cars + Life

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The BMW 3 Series is the epitome of the sports sedan. Since its debut in 1975, the 3 Series has been the undisputed leader of the premium segment. More than 13 million customers drive it worldwide. The show shows all models and the vehicle history.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: The Enduro Park in Hechlingen is a former quarry that was transformed into one of the leading enduro training areas in Europe in the 1990s. Qualified instructors instruct motocross fans in driving skills.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: One attempt by manufacturers at the Paris Motor Show is to replace the traditional combustion engine with alternative drives. Mercedes-Benz founded the Generation EQ sub-brand specifically for this purpose. Volkswagen also wants to introduce electric models.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Exciting images show the viewer the highlights from all eras of automobile history. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. This time the NSU Ro 80 is in the spotlight with its revolutionary aerodynamic body.

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Assistance systems on two-wheelers usually seem exotic or even unthinkable. BMW is now offering the blind spot warning system for the first time. This is ideal for the dense traffic in big cities, the home territory of the new C 650 GT maxi scooter.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: One of the toughest competitions takes place in Langenaltheim, the Steinbeisser Trophy.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The winner will be chosen from the eight vehicles developed in the design competition. All models are comparable and are presented to 500 test customers and a jury. The jury selects two models for the final.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: How will we transport goods and people in the future? VW is working with Ford to save costs and pool expertise on the new van. At Volvo, safety has always been a priority - and that also applies to its trucks.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Convertibles from England enjoy cult status all over the world. Whether Jaguar F-Type, Aston Martin Vanquish Volante or Bentley Continental, they impress with exclusivity and elegance. English roadsters offer more sporting spirit than any other.

The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. The program shows the idea behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in practical testing.

programme.desc: In the 1970s and 1980s, automotive advertising boomed, fueled by car production. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining, but also more and more expensive to produce.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is regularly open to the general public. Many people drive through the “Green Hell” in their private vehicles. Fascinating Nordschleife fans talk about what they associate with the ring.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: The show is about different car races and people with a passion for engines. Spectacular events are always presented, such as in this case the DTM show event in Munich, where the drivers present their tricks.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show is one of the 5 most important car shows in the world.

programme.title: Rear view mirror

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!

programme.title: Stunt Heroes

programme.title: Top Speed Classic

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S2 E30 — Episode 30We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E68 — Rally MonsterThe program reports on the monster rally cars of Group B and the DTM variant of the BMW M E30.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E32 — Episode 32 This time the show reports on the Repco Supercars Championship 2024.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 — BMW 3 SeriesThe BMW 3 Series is the epitome of the sports sedan. Since its debut in 1975, the 3 Series has been the undisputed leader of the premium segment. More than 13 million customers drive it worldwide. The show shows all models and the vehicle history.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Tourists in the Green Hell 2 Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Enduro Park HechlingenThe Enduro Park in Hechlingen is a former quarry that was transformed into one of the leading enduro training areas in Europe in the 1990s. Qualified instructors instruct motocross fans in driving skills.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S3 E18 — Drive of the futureAn attempt by manufacturers at the Paris Motor Show is to replace the traditional combustion engine with alternative drives. Mercedes-Benz founded the Generation EQ sub-brand specifically for this purpose. Volkswagen also wants to introduce electric models.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S2 E20 — NSU Ro 80 Exciting images show the viewer the highlights from all eras of automobile history. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. This time the NSU Ro 80 is in the spotlight with its revolutionary aerodynamic body.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S1 E15 — D1 Drift ChampionshipThe topics of the program include: "Racing flounder with motorcycle power - magic X one on the Hockenheimring.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S2 E1 — Trailer StuntThey are the focus of action series and films, and yet they remain unrecognized. Huge explosions and daring jumps are part of these professionals' daily business: The stunt heroes show how much hard work really goes into the action and why the fun doesn't stop there for these adrenaline junkies! An exciting look behind the scenes of a slightly different everyday working life.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S6 E250 — Cars & FriendsIn this episode, presenter Martin Utberg accompanies visitors to the “Cars & Friends” event at the Hans-Peter Porsche Traumwerk in Anger near Salzburg through a weekend full of automotive passion and enthusiasm.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 — BMW M2High-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. We take a close look at the current M2 and test its drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development.

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: S7 E2 — Suspected Drugs Dog handlers Steve and Razor support their colleagues in Exeter on an operation. There the police were forced to use CS gas against a violent man. The team is also on the trail of thieves with a penchant for Rolex watches.

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks.

programme.desc: Skate Vert in the Olympic Park: Halfpipe in the Olympic Lake, spectacular tricks and lots of airtime on 4 meters.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series
programme.desc: E104 — Araxá, Round 1The start of the 2025 UCI Mountain Bike World Cup season leads to Brazilian terrain in Araxá.

programme.title: LIVE: Mash Men's BMX Final
programme.desc: BMX action on the 80 m jump line: from the 8 m roll-in to three kickers – speed, flow and fat tricks.

programme.title: LIVE: Munich Mash: MTB & BMX Best Trick
programme.desc: Best Trick Contest: BMX & MTB over 80 m jump line – three kickers, one goal: maximum style.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series
programme.desc: High speed in the Alps: The highlights from La Thuile show downhill mountain biking on fast, technical trails where courage, precision and control are crucial.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: Real Madrid as a milestone: The test match becomes the highlight of the club's history for Salzburg, told from the perspective of referee and sports director Christoph Freund.

programme.title: LIVE: BIKE: Red Bull Cerro Abajo - Genua 2026
programme.desc: The best urban downhill MTB riders compete against each other on challenging routes.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: AmmanIn Amman, the Red Bull soapbox race is transformed into a colorful spectacle: creative vehicles fight their way through a wild course - full of speed, twists and crashes.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Racing: Top 50 crowd favorites
programme.desc: Enjoy the 50 most popular designs and moments from Red Bull Soapbox Racing from 2014 to 2025.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: São PauloIn São Paulo, the Red Bull soapbox race goes completely crazy: creative teams, crazy vehicles and pure chaos make the race one of the wildest spectacles on four wheels.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: HelsinskiIn Helsinki, everything gets out of control at the Red Bull Soapbox Race: fast descents, creative constructions and lots of chaos ensure unforgettable moments.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.desc: Speek skating in Norway, base jumping from Mount Everest, skating in the office: "For Reals" shows in entertaining clips how athletes from all over the world push the limits of what is possible.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.desc: S1 E1 — From F1 desert racing to a skate park in the skyWakeskating in front of a skyscraper in Dubai. F1 drivers race on water in Florida and the Nevada desert. Ride a skate park attached to a hot air balloon. For Red Bull athletes, it's all part of everyday business.

programme.title: Prime Minister has fallen
programme.desc: The Premier Padel Germany P2 focuses on exciting rallies, strong duels and high-class play. The highlights of the tournament show padel at the top level.

programme.title: Prime Minister has fallen
programme.desc: E83 — Germany P2At the Premier Padel Germany P2, the focus is on exciting rallies, strong duels and high-class play. Highlights are presented, showing the sport in all its glory. Look forward to the great moments.

programme.title: Prime Minister has fallen
programme.desc: E3 — Finals 2025 BarcelonaThe 2025 Premier Padel season ended in Barcelona. The highlights from the grand finale will be shown.

programme.title: Prime Minister has fallen
programme.desc: E21 — Santiago P1, HighlightsIn Chile's capital, the world's best padel athletes compete at a high level - literally. The P1 stop in Santiago brings emotion, energy and tactical masterpieces on the court.

programme.title: Prime Minister has fallen
programme.desc: E25 — 2025 Qatar Major, HighlightsSpektakuläre Ballwechsel und intensive Matches prägen das Event im Khalifa International Complex.

programme.title: Blue Crush – Women’s surfing in the 90s
programme.desc: A milestone of its time, Blue Crush charts the rise of women's surfing in the late '90s - with Lisa Andersen, Rochelle Ballard, Layne Beachley, Serena Brooke and Megan Abubo.

programme.title: SURF: Against Gravity
programme.desc: Born in the water, shaped by the ocean: Olympian and surfing professional Leon Glatzer talks about freedom, setbacks and his journey to the best surfing spots in the world.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Man OverboardIn 2013, Jimmy Smith made history with a furious comeback in the America's Cup. Ten years later, he wants to transform the US SailGP team into title contenders - but is thwarted by the team's owners.

programme.title: Red Bull Dolomitenmann
programme.desc: S1 E7 — 2025The Red Bull Dolomitenmann 2025: The toughest team competition in the world. At the 38th Red Bull Dolomitenmann, the athletes go far beyond their physical and mental limits.

programme.title: MUSIC: Red Bull Show 100 - extra
programme.desc: Austria's "AUT of ORDA" takes on the challenge of organizing their very first joint show in just 100 hours and performing it on stage after the countdown has ended. After the 100 hours, the show takes place in Vienna's Marx Hall.
